name: FloatVR Relaxation and Focus (Sleep, Anxiety, ADHD)

reviews.review_title: FloatVR is Key To My Mental Health
reviews.review_description: I specifically wanted a Quest 3 because I wanted to use it for meditation and cool light shows. I love FloatVR and almost immediately got a life subscription because it's a key part to maintaining my mental health. There are a variety of features, and it's also easy to customize your experience. One of the best things about FloatVR is that it's open to suggestions and feedback and has continued to evolve in the time I've been using it. I look forward to seeing future innovations.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the nice review! We are honored and touched that you consider Float a key part of maintaining your mental health. Lots more to come - what you're seeing is the tip of the iceberg.

reviews.review_description:
Float has genuinely become one of the most beautiful and calming experiences in my VR journey.

It is not just an app — it feels like stepping into a peaceful emotional space where the nervous system can finally breathe. The environments are stunning, immersive and deeply soothing. I especially love how Float creates a sense of gentle movement, awe and quiet focus without overwhelming the mind.

As someone who lives with stress and spends a lot of time caring for others, I found Float incredibly grounding. Sometimes after only 20–30 minutes I come out feeling mentally lighter, calmer and more emotionally reset.

The visual quality is beautiful, the atmosphere feels thoughtful and artistic, and the overall experience feels created with genuine care rather than just technology.

Thank you to the Float team for creating something that brings peace, beauty and stillness into people’s lives. ❤️💙🙏🏻

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for this beautiful review. We feel blesses that Float is providing such deep relief to those who need it (which, in this day and age, seems to be almost all of us).  We appreciate you taking the time to write this.

reviews.review_description: A 5 minute relaxation float has become part of my daily routine . Love the addition of the singing choir to some of the sound tracks. Each float session is unique so it never gets boring. I also like the fact that you can add a voice to the float giving affirmations and reflections if you choose to.The soundtracks are varied too and it makes giving up 5 minutes of my day for a relaxation float something that my busy brain has bought into.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We're glad Float is now part of your wellness routine. We are a team of "busy brains" and we know how hard it can be to give up time for relaxation. Glad it's helping!

reviews.review_description:
Update:I decided to go ahead with lifetime subscription and glad i did. I am enjoying the Float experience and am thankful for having this as a wellness tool. I really appreciate the encouraging spoken guidance and affirmations aswell. It would be beautiful if there would be an option you could click for getting some encouraging Faith-based encouragement aswell.
I appreciate all the options to choose based on guidance you need for grief/anxiety and more. I highly recommend!Thankful and Blessed to have found this.♡







I have considered getting subscription (Lifetime option)but i would like to do it on meta app.Not through email. Is this a possibility for the future? I really am enjoying Float.

developer_response.body: Thanks Mrs. Bag. Pretty sure it will be possible at some point but we don't have a timeline on this - sorry! We hope you'll consider subscribing through the existing method.

reviews.review_description:
I keep returning to update my original review as I become more and more impressed with the content. I wish I could give it 10 stars lol   All of the possibilities here are highly. customizable.  Do you want to see a more "simple" content or very elaborate?  Do you prefer certain colors?  How long do you want to float? For me, the answer is forever. This is the only app that I consistently use every single day.  I really can't say enough good things about it.  Great for stress relief and even distraction from pain.  See original review below.

I received a Quest 3 from hubby for Christmas (which I had requested) and now have a number of relaxing apps that I've purchased over the last two months but none of them  compare to Float!!  The 5-minute freebie intro float is nice enough but it's nothing compared to what you receive when you go all in.  I was sold and didn't waste my time or money on a silly yearly subscription but went full Monty with a lifetime subscription for $79.99 with absolutely no regrets!  

I started out with a 30-minute relaxation float but, when that ended, I went with a relaxation float for I INFINITY!!   Now I would have thought that it would start out the same as the 30-minute float, only longer, but no!  It was totally different.  AND you'd think it would lull you to mentally-drug-induced monotony but absolutely not!  All fresh, unpredictable, and mental nirvana!  I can't imagine how many hours went into developing this but it is worth every single penny.  Buy the lifetime subscription, you won't be sorry.

developer_response.body:
Awwww thanks so much. Feedback like this makes it fun to get up in the morning and continue to build. 
PS: This is STILL only the tip of the iceberg.

reviews.review_title: I needed this more than I even knew
reviews.review_description: Really helps to energize me in the morning, relax me in the evening, the positive affirmations, the different scenes, the beautiful artwork, the tranquility of feeling like you can float into another realm. It really takes you out of your day-to-day and decreases stress and makes me so happy. Keep up the great work. ￼

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing this! We're so glad it's helping you.

reviews.review_title: This Is A Go To App For Me 🙏
reviews.review_description:
I am recently diagnosed with ADHD (AuDHD) & when I saw it was also for people like us, I thought I would give it a go. 

For me, it really works and calms my brain down when I'm feeling overwhelmed & my brain is hyperactive & it always ends up putting me to sleep, which is great. It also makes me calmer after using it too.

I really recommend this app, & together with medication for neurodiversity and such, it doubles the strength and for me it does actually work. 

Also it's great to know that it was developed by neurodiverse individuals FOR neurodiverse individuals too 😊

I notice they only have 24 followers,  this should be more. I'm going to recommend it to ADHD UK (the main charity in the UK) & start promoting it in my work with others who have the condition. 

I'm proud of you guys & I'm going to make sure everyone knows that. 

👍👍👍👍👍 Out Of 👍👍👍👍👍

I'm giving it 5 thumbs up out of 5  😂

developer_response.body:
Thanks Mike! We're super glad to hear this is helping, and thanks for recommending it. We'd be happy to connect with ADHD UK if they find the app interesting. 

PS: We know there is room for improvement - 5 stars does not mean that an app cannot be improved. It means it's doing what it says it does in a satisfying way. 5-start reviews help us reach more people, which in turn helps us improve the app. Something to think about. Either way - thanks for the kind words and we're proud to have you Floating with us.

reviews.review_description: This is an absolutely amazing program. I give it as many stars as possible. It has really helped with focus, anxiety, and a lot of other issues. I highly recommend this program.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing this with us. We're glad it's helping!

reviews.review_description: Sometimes you just need to take it easy and this is the perfect way to do it. I like that it is always different so whilst relaxing you don't get bored.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review!

reviews.review_title: This is the best app for meditation
reviews.review_description: I love this app. I can relax, get energized, have a mental refresh and more. Each program makes me feel different and i have posted videos of some of the programs on my Facebook feed and Facebook groups I belong to plus YouTube. I paid for the premium version and I love all the extra content. Everyone should try the binaural beats, positive affirmations, adjusting the complexity and brainbow. I couldn't recommend this app anymore than I do.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your FaceBook and Youtube Videos. Your positive energy about Float literally keeps us going. 
Your purchase to unlock the full version allows us to continue development.
We are very grateful for your support.

reviews.review_description: Spend ages just watching things float by especially the quirky creatures

developer_response.body: Thanks! We're glad you enjoyed the experience!

reviews.review_description: I purchased this in order so help retrain my nervous system to leave flight or fight mode from PTSD. While the PTSD had been in remission mentally for quite some time, the body tension it created that then became normal still remains. I have used sensory deprivation float tanks in the past with moderate improvement in symptoms. I am using this is a similar fashion. One good problem to have is that I almost always fall asleep in a few minutes of starting the float! I have not yet tested my sleep quality since starting it, but I have cut my sleep medicine dosage in half with success since starting to float. I recommend giving this a try if forced relaxing is what you need.

developer_response.body: Thanks Jennifer! The fact you've been able to cut sleep medicine dosage in half since starting Float is HUGE. Thanks for sharing this.

reviews.review_description:
I find myself looking forward to doing a Float session. My soul mate died recently, and the grief is tremendous. The Float has beautiful and mesmerizing visuals, along with affirmations that you can personalize. This gives me a short break from my sorrow.
Thank you.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review and kind words during this hard time. 
I am also grieving a loved one.
I am grateful to hear that Float is bringing you some comforting distraction from your sorrow. I recently wrote a number of observations of my grief that are included in FloatVR under spoken word in the Grief category. 
I wish you strength and support.
Thanks again.

reviews.review_description: Does a lot to help get rid of the stress of my corporate job. I recommend binaural beats for extra oomph. Also, very nice to know there are real humans behind the show.

developer_response.body: Real human waving  :) Thanks for the nice review!

reviews.review_description:
The people at float are generous and kind and always looking to improve our lives.
I haven't used it as often as I would like, but it's always there at any time of need, or just for a quick escape. 2 thumbs, 5 stars from me !

developer_response.body: Thanks Daveyboy! That's very kind of you to say. Glad it's helping at your times of need.

reviews.review_description: Tried to launch the app multiple times and my Quest 2 just crashed out each time… was a process to kill the app and get back to operational. Gave up after a few attempts.

developer_response.body: Sorry you experienced this. Some recent updates of the Meta OS have reduced the available memory and caused this to happen occasionally on the Quest 2. We've just pushed an update that should make this a lot better. If it works for you now, please consider revising the rating - thanks!

reviews.review_description: I do feel like I am moving thru 3-D space.  Colors and patterns are amazing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We really appreciate the support. Float On.

reviews.review_description: Decent app, but unclear pricing and poor communication. I emailed to ask how much it costs, never received a response. For a paid product, that’s a dealbreaker. There are better, more transparent alternatives.

developer_response.body:
Hi - that's a fair criticism, and we are sorry if we missed your email. 
You can see our pricing here: https://Floatvr.io/unlock. 
I would strongly advise paying through one of our emails - it helps connect your Float account with your payment (many people enter the wrong email, for example). Cheers

reviews.review_description: I purchased this app based on the review I saw here and I didn't regret it. This app is amazing!! I completely detached myself from the real world. I could relax my mind and I felt myself in the present moment appreciating the images on the video. When it finished I feel very chilled 😌

developer_response.body: Thanks for this review, RunningCrab! So glad it helps you unwind. Thanks for supporting us by joining the premium experience.

reviews.review_description:
Float VR has completely transformed my meditation practice. The visualizations are breathtaking and the soundscapes deeply soothing..
This isn’t just a meditation app — it’s an immersive experience. The environments are so transportive that they quiet my mind almost instantly, making it effortless to drop into a deep, embodied state of calm and presence.

developer_response.body: Thank you for this review, Friendly Mantis Shrimp! Love having you as part of our growing community of friendly mantis shrimps just Floating around :-)

reviews.review_description: I love this program helps me wake up in the morning and relax after work. Clears my head and calms me. I recommend this app.

developer_response.body: Thanks for this. Using Float in the mornings and after work is the best combo. Glad it's working for you!

reviews.review_description: I’ve only used this app for a few minutes I’m absolutely blown away this app is something else absolutely out of this world

developer_response.body: Thanks Arnold! "out of this world" is exactly what we're aiming for!

reviews.review_description: I'm using float VR natively on my quest 3. At a minimum, the visualizations and animations seem nice and relaxing. But the app is very poorly optimized and the lagginess makes me feel nauseated pretty quickly. $63.99 for lifetime out the window. No need to reply from the developer and no I won't email you for support. There really isn't anything you can adjust when running it natively on the quest 3 so I'm not going to waste my time.

Nice app. I only tried the free version. Not sure if the subscription would be worth it and not going to try. The fact that it puts 5 hours on the clock when you first run it means the chance of a refund, if I don't think it's worth it, could be a bit problematic.

developer_response.body: Hello my GoodKeenMan (couldn't resist). I am not sure what you mean by "5 hours on the clock when you first run it". In any case: we refund if asked to within the first month, unrelated to how much you used it.

reviews.review_title: FloatVR is Challenging, Fun & a Joy!
reviews.review_description: FloatVR is a joy to use. I'm a daily Vipassana practitioner (focusing on the mind/body connection). These many choices of visuals & music give my practice some wonderfully new mind-expanding dimensions, are challenging (staying in the present moment) & just plain fun whether using it to energize or relax. Love FloatVR. Keep up the great work.

Even a short session leaves you reset and calm.  The only reason it's a 4 not a 5 is that I wish the world you drift through were more varied.  Also I'd rather pay once and then use the app.  I'm not likely to continue a monthly sub.

developer_response.body: Thanks for this review VR_Val.  Just pointing out that (a) we keep expanding and adding on a monthly and even weekly basis, which is also the reason this is a subscription app; that (b) we still have a lifetime plan  available; and that (c) we made sure you can get a lot of value even in the free version. Cheers.

reviews.review_description:
What a beautiful trippy experience!  FloatVR showed up randomly one day on my Meta Quest 2 screen, when I was wearing the VR headset, as the #1 recommendation at the top of the list.  I've never clicked on anything like this before, and had no idea what FloatVR was, but I decided to install the app, and I am sure glad I did!  

Even though I don't have a paid subscription, I can still view enough minutes of several levels within the app. All I had to do is give them my email address to unlock more areas of the game.  The only thing it's missing is a "history" function, or something within the VR app that lets you see how many previous levels you've gone through in the past.  

Initially I got this one confused with a similar VR app called "Tripp" but I'd say FloatVR is much better.  Although I did notice 2 levels in the "Lab" section (winter & geometry) were glitchy.  Like they didn't have the smooth seankess scrolling that all the other levels had.  It can't be a problem on my end, because if it were, then ALL of the FloatVR sections would appear stuttery and chunky.  But just these 2 do however.  (I did later find out that these couple "nature scenes" do actually play flawlessly on the Meta Quest 3, just not in the Meta Quest 2).  

But all in all I would definitely recommend this VR app for a moving wonderful trippy experience!  Especially if you're on edibles - it'll be a mind-blowing high!  Stunning visuals and euphoria like you've never seen before!

This app is absolutely amazingly beautiful. It has helped me so much in my mental health journey. I use a couple of times a day and it has helped reduce my anxiety and lifted my mood during depression times. If your on the fence jump on it! Totally worth it for your mental health., the customer service is outstanding!!

As a long time user of Tripp I wanted something that wasn't primarily just a static environment. This immediately ticked all the boxes. The environments, though not highly textured, are great and the slow movement and the ever-changing music is just excellent. I can see a great deal of potential in this app.

If you’re looking for an app that will completely relax you without all the nonsense that can sometimes go along with it, run and buy this one. I wish they had an app with their beautiful music that I could use to sleep
Got old quickly.

I kinda like it. 
I am new to VR and my first time using it, I found it to be very relaxing. The music could be a tad better, Which is why the four stars. but over all its good enough for Me. I think the flying effect video could be a little better. Different cosmic things or experiences. I would recommend, It works for me. I look forward to more.

I am literally blown away at the technology behind this app! I honestly am shocked it’s not 5 stars all the way! There is so much to gain and so much to love, it’s absolutely transforming. Take a chance, walk on the wild side, you will not regret going on this journey. It’s my favorite place to be in virtual reality! Just take a chance and be transformed!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you Skygirl! Much appreciated. We have much more planned - this is still only the beginning.

reviews.review_description:
I'd like to be able to have more control over the visual content. I find the worm holes very encapsulating and the road annoying, because it just feels like a driving hallucination. I'd love to be able to import music and have that sync to visuals. Being able to manually set a BPM would be very cool. I liked the observations, would be nice if we could select what types we hear i.e. Calm, motivational, energising etc

If this expands a little more I'd seriously consider a lifetime subscription.
Float is a work in progress but already nice to you use. Look forward to further refinement.

While I enjoyed doing the intro, you need to give your email address to explore any further.  I did this, but the email they send has no option to verify your email, which was supposed to be the whole point of getting the email. It just sends a link to the meta quest app where you launch Float again, but that doesn't verify your email, so you just keep repeating a frustrating loop. Put me in a very agitated frame of mind which is the opposite of what it's supposed to do.

developer_response.body: Hi Brand-Maid, sorry this happened to you - please reply to any of our emails with this problem and we can fix this quickly.

reviews.review_description: I like the way we are moving into the levels and not just staring at something like most competitor. Float is unique and full of potential. I also like that they expand and do better with time

A lot of different environments to choose from. Contacted the makers to suggest adding your own music and they said it will probably be implemented in the future, so that's a good thing, quick reply from customer service.

reviews.review_title: Three stars would be too generous.
reviews.review_description: Very few environments and little content, the main point is to sell subscriptions and gather email addresses just to reveal the price. (dirty business practice)  With as little and static content as this, I find it almost ridiculous to ask for subscription, but of course, everyone wants a free regular income, preferably forgotten by the subscriber, and with little and unimpressive content like this, being forgotten is kind of granted. There are several MUCH better alternatives,that offer much more for less.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for this feedback. We appreciate all feedback and we love hearing about all the people whose lives have been improved by Floating, but we learn the most from the bad ones. 
- - 
In any case, we're sorry you found the amount of content inadequate. Float is generative in nature and we are VERY deliberate in our choice to have less options to choose from, but make those choices ever changing so that you don't experience the exact same moment twice. Many users appreciate that simplicity when they want to kick back and relax. We understand if that doesn't work for you, and hope you will find the right app for you. 
- - 
As for subscriptions: the core experience is free forever and offers a lot of value. Subscription is for those who use Float on a regular basis (as many do) and would like more content, longer durations, and more control over the content. 

Hope this makes sense.

reviews.review_description: I find this helpful for a racing brain,, although I wish I could add binaural beats, and could use the tunnel only (not the "road"). Giving 5-stars for the free version though!

I'm in my 50's and new to the VR world. When I discovered FloatVR, it was everything for me. I just kick back and relax and get lost. I absolutely love everything about it so I upgraded. It definitely helps with anxiety and bedtime or if you just wanna unwind. I also love how each experience gets better over time. Love itttttt!!!!❤️🩷🧡💛💚💙🩵💜🤎🖤🩶🤍

developer_response.body: Thank you for this lovely review, Tracey!

reviews.review_description: Ummm mushroom microdosing and this app were meant to be. Euphoric and puts my mental at ease. Maybe people who complain don’t know how to actually relax.

I admire what they’re trying to do, but after a couple of sessions it felt like something I would have seen around the turn of the century. The music has clunky transitions that regularly snapped me out of my flow state, quite a few of the various sprites in the tunnel were clearly designed to conserve processing power… even the title screen and main menu need work, looking pixelated and dated.

To make things even worse, in order to unlock the “free” version, you have to enter your email, and of course they start sending you stuff without asking if it’s OK to start sending you stuff. I’d love to support a clearly indie creator, but even the free version ain’t worth the price.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for this honest feedback. We appreciate every point of feedback and the time users take writing them.

FloatVR is a generative experience, which means it constantly creates new variations in real time. That limits our ability to use the performance tricks that are possible in pre-scripted environments, but we’re continuing to refine it to get the best of both worlds: freshness and fidelity.

We are aware that in some areas, the audio transitions can feel a bit clunky, and we are  actively working on smoothing them out. 

We are still in early access, and feedback like yours directly helps us prioritize what to improve. Thanks again for giving FloatVR a try—we hope you’ll check back in as it evolves.

reviews.review_description:
I wasn’t sure what to expect, but my time with FloatVR turned out to be far more meaningful than I anticipated. The visuals are mesmerizing, the music beautifully composed, and the overall atmosphere is deeply calming. What surprised me most was how emotionally impactful the experience became—something about the combination of color, sound, and space allowed me to feel a sense of release and peace I hadn’t realized I needed.

This isn’t just another meditation app or visualizer. It invites you to let go completely, without instructions or effort, and just be. I came away feeling lighter, grounded, and quietly grateful. I’ll definitely be coming back.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing this, Josh! This review is wonderfully articulated. We're glad to hear Float connects for you.

reviews.review_description: This app has so much potential with fun things. Would be cool to actually be free fall floating or jump scare modes. Hopefully new content gets added before my month sub ends.

Let me start by saying thank you. I have been using Float at bedtime for three weeks now. I am 65 years old and have battled insomnia for most of my life. Even though I can feel very tired when ready for bed, as soon as my head hits the pillow I become wide awake. It can take me up to 3 hours to fall asleep. 
After trying the free version of Float I immediately felt so relaxed. My brain seemed to shut off. To me that was amazing as I usually can't stop thinking about... Everything. I bought the Lifetime membership without hesitation. 
I tried the different Float experience's. The Relax is the best for sleeping I have fallen asleep within 20 minutes and have had the best night's sleep. 
The 5 minutes Affirmation float is a great way to start my day it gives me focus and generally makes me feel good.
I find that the Energy floats can get me thinking fun thoughts. I feel like I am in the most amazing Water Slide. 
I would like to see something like a Summer night float down a winding river under the starry sky. 
Overall 100% satisfied.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We are actually working on something in that direction. Stay tuned! We love that Float helps you fall asleep. Thanks for sharing this.

reviews.review_description: I have several apps similar to FloatVR, but since getting this one, it's become my daily choice. I like the fact that what I experience today is new and different from what I saw yesterday. I find the variety of outcomes to be unique to this app. I like the music and the ability to add binaural beats. If you are looking for a meditative VR experience, I highly recommend you try FloatVR.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We are speeding up expanding our worlds with more variations. Glad you're finding that satisfying.

reviews.review_title: Had high hopes. Felt let down.
reviews.review_description: Watched the intro and graphics seem very 1990s. Then, I was required to enter my email to access more content. Not impressed. Intro is not enough to commit to anything else. Uninstalling.

developer_response.body: No worries - we appreciate different people have different tastes and different needs.  We're working on revisiting the intro - we keep expanding Float all the time, and the intro is actually one of the oldest experiences we created! Thanks for this feedback and we hope you'll try it again at some point in the future.

reviews.review_description: Float has so much to offer and keeps getting better. Options for personalizing your float to your current mood keep expanding. I use it for focus, calming my brain, relaxing before bed, releasing anxiety during the day.  The team is responsive and working hard to improve and bring new experiences. I love supporting small startups with unique concepts. This is well worth it!

developer_response.body: Thanks for this! Much appreciated. Feedback like this is what makes us committed to working even harder on making Float amazing.

reviews.review_description:
I don’t even know where to begin. I’m new to the VR world so everything I have tried is an entirely new experience. 
What caught my eye to Float VR was the mention of ADHD. At times my brain feels like a TV set and someone else has the remote just clicking away. 
The first time I used Float VR it was as if someone pushed the pause button and just let me drift into this wonderfully calm space. All negativity, anxiety or worrying just drifted away. 
I’m not usually one to pay attention to shapes and textures but you become immersed in this world that’s nothing but. 
I’ve never been able to meditate due to the ADHD. My mind is too busy but this has changed all that. When I have a Float VR session I’m completely relaxed and in a zen state. 
I can’t thank you enough for this.
Float is a great experience for finding your inner peace through visual meditation guidance.

FloatVR is a pretty decent and versatile Meditation app, the free version gets you a lot of stuff and the Premium subscription doesn't seem like a necessity to enjoy the app, while still being a way to upgrade your experience. You can go for a more traditional experience, with a person guiding you through an average Meditation, or if you're like me you can use the visuals as a form of faux laser show using your own music in the Meta Quest's browser. 

Overall, it's not a bad app especially for being free, I'd check it out yourself and see if it catches your eye.

I absolutely love it especially the Mandela ones because I get the best sleep afterwards.  will probably use it every night just to sleep because I have insomnia. 
The beautiful colors and all the different patterns are amazing!
You have to experience the gallery as well which is fantastic.

I suffer from depression and anxiety since I lost three siblings and then my daughter committed suicide. The only time I am not thinking about it is when I am using Float. I can actually feel my body relax. It is my only therapy. Thank you Float.

developer_response.body: Speaking for the entire Float team: Thank you for sharing this painful personal story. We are sorry for your terrible loss. Knowing that Float helps ease some of this pain, gives us the fuel we need to make Float even better. Thank you.

reviews.review_description: All my life I have always been "on the go". I was never able to truly relax ( thanks dad ). But only now aged 68 am I able to disconnect for periods of time, at my choosing with the help of Float. I am more mindful than ever, noticing changes in thoughts, more patience and my demeaner seems to be softening.. Thank you.

I like to use this app before sleep. I use it to calm down and relax, also I like to put a YouTube song and reflect a little about the life while floating. I think it could enhance the visuals by using modern tech like GenAI and be more customizable for personal tastes.

reviews.review_title: Customize Your Calm with Float VR
reviews.review_description:
Float VR has become an essential part of my daily routine. As I explored the app, I discovered which experiences worked best for me. It was exciting to try them all out and fine-tune the experiences I enjoyed the most The environments are incredible and the ‘Tweak’ feature allows me to customize my experience to meet my preferences. The daily affirmation has been a fantastic way to start my day, and ending my day with a 15 min relaxation float has made a noticeable difference in my overall well-being.   

I decided to purchase the lifetime membership and a month later I have no regrets. As a mental health counselor turned software engineer, I can see the direction the developers are taking, and I’m excited to support their efforts. 

Another reviewer mentioned that their dreams have become more vivid and memorizable since using Float. I can’t say for sure it’s the app or other changes in my life, but I’ve noticed a shift in my dreams as well. 

A big thank you to the Float VR team- keep up the great work!
This app would be great if it could connect to my premium subscription, but there appears to be no way to troubleshoot the connection.

developer_response.body: Hi - our apologies for missing this. Please reply to any of our emails for assistance. We would love to help you fix that.

reviews.review_description: I've tried downloading it multiple times. It says it's ready to go but when I select it, it stalls out after "checking for updates" & creating worlds, watering gardens & then just sits there! Very frustrating!

developer_response.body: Hey NeonSquirrel, this can sometimes happen if the data was no downloaded correctly. Try to uninstall and re-install. It that solves it, please consider revising your your review and score. If it did not work, please contact us at hello@floatvr.io and we'll be happy to help you out.

reviews.review_description: This has frequently become my world away from the real world. I love the relaxation, but especially the energy it gives me. I have ADHD and misophonia, and I'm constantly stressed. I love this app for escaping reality, but also for the energy I get while exercising. I was a former Maloka user, which had issues a couple years ago when  discovered float, but this is so much better.

I've had Float for about a month now, and it's one of the apps that I find I use the most, out of a big library that also includes a Quest+ subscription.

The Float environments are creative, artistic, and well-crafted. They also seem to get updates very frequently, and it's fun to keep an eye out for the new features & refinements when you "go in". Float has been great to help me mentally reset during hectic work weeks or to zone out while trying to solve tough problems. Mid-afternoon breaks for a 10- to 15-minute session seemed to be perfect, for me, for those purposes. 

Another, somewhat surprising feature that I just started using is that you can actually run 2D windowed apps (like the web browser) inside Float! I've tried a few android apps (sideloaded) for music and audiobooks, and also used the Quest remote desktop app for computer work a couple of times. All were very smooth, very positive experiences (although I wouldn't recommend choosing an inspiring or high-energy environment when you absolutely have to focus on mundane office tasks!).

I am excited to see how this app develops over time, for both its recreational and therapeutic purposes. All in all, I think Float is well worth it and I'm glad to support a talented team that's building a great app to accomplish a social good.

I have been using Float for several months and cannot say enough good things about it. Not only is it beautiful, but it is an effective tool for relaxing. Or energizing, depending on which Float you choose. 
The experience can be tweaked for complexity, color, music, etc., making it a personalized experience. Added to this is a great community on social media where you can interact with the creators as they experiment. Questions are answered, suggestions are discussed. The entire package is unlike any other app.

Float has helped me feel less stressed and sleep better too. When something happens that stresses me out or upsets me, my brain has a high tendency to over analyze things and play the what if game, going over and over stuff in my head. That doesn't help me and definitely affects my ability to sleep when my brain won't stop running in circles. Float has helped me stop doing that. It is relaxing, and I find it helps me not be so negative. The Mandalas and the Mandala hybrid are also beautiful. I love that the patterns for Mandalas and light tunnels are constantly being updated.

I don’t usually write reviews, but after getting a lifetime subscription to Float VR, I felt like I had to share just how incredible it is.

From the first time I put on the headset, I was completely blown away by how immersive the experience is. The visuals are stunning, the worlds feel alive, and the way everything flows makes it so easy to lose track of time. It’s not just another VR platform—it’s like having an entirely new space to explore, relax, and connect with others.

One of my favorite things is the variety of experiences. Whether I want to chill out in a calming, meditative environment, get creative, or even connect with friends in a virtual space, Float VR delivers every single time. The quality and thoughtfulness behind the content make it feel worth every penny.

Deciding to go for the lifetime subscription was a big commitment, but honestly, it was the best decision I’ve made in a while. Knowing that I’ll always have access to everything Float VR has to offer—plus all the updates they keep rolling out—is such a great feeling. It’s like investing in a platform that grows with you.

If you’ve been thinking about trying Float VR, stop overthinking and just do it. It’s an amazing way to unwind, have fun, and even connect with others in a way that feels surprisingly personal. I’ve been using it almost every day, and I’m still finding new things to love about it.

developer_response.body: Hi Sam - thank you so much for this amazing review. One of our favorite ones ever :-)

reviews.review_title: 5/5 – A must-have for relaxation and me
reviews.review_description:
FloatVR has quickly become an essential part of my daily routine. The way the music syncs perfectly with the visual experience is mesmerizing—it creates an effortless sense of immersion that feels calming and deeply engaging. I often select a 21-minute Float session, and every time, I am shocked at how quickly the time passes. The experience is so soothing that I emerge feeling refreshed as if I’ve taken a mental reset without any effort.

FloatVR requires no specific breathing techniques or focus exercises, unlike traditional meditation apps. Instead, it invites you to a beautifully designed, ever-changing world. The generative visuals are stunning, and the subtle interactive elements add a layer of wonder. It is the perfect way to unwind after a long day or start the morning with a moment of mindfulness.

I highly recommend FloatVR for anyone looking to alleviate stress, improve focus, or enjoy a peaceful, immersive escape. It is more than just an app—it is an experience I now look forward to daily.

developer_response.body: Thanks you so much for this lovely review and feedback. We are (still) only getting started :-)

reviews.review_description: Float is my favorite Meta Quest app. It's my goto when I want to relax or unwind and gather my thoughts. It really works! Try the free version. I bought the lifetime version after trying it. Its that good.. Support is great and the developer seems to really care about the app and it's users. Highly recommend!
Horrible, it locked up my head set and will not let me even restart my headset. I had new batteries in my handsets. I changed batteries no change. I do not recommend this game.

Float is the only App I use at least twice daily. I use the Engergize setting before and after work. This App uses light, color, and sound to stimulate your brain. The App features visual shapes, patterns, and colors with electronic music and adjustable binaural beats. If you don't care for the music, listen to your own. You can use this with exercise equipment like a treadmill or stationary bike. 
I find that it calms my mind while distracting me, and allows me to "unpack" the day, kinda feels like my brain gies into a "defrag" state.
I have noticed I am more calm, and more clear headed while at work as well as I feel like I'm sleeping a bit better since I started using this. 
There are also spoken observations as well as daily affirmations with great positive messages.
It seems like new stuff is being added all of the time.
I selected the lifetime subscription, and I have zero regrets. 
I love this App and I highly recommend it to anyone looking for something to help with racing thoughts or brain static.
I feel like this therapy would be beneficial for many kinds of mental conditions.
I’m really enjoying using Float. I like that you can customize your visual experiences and there is a wide variety of options to choose from. It always gets my day started in the right direction!

reviews.review_title: Great way to end the day
reviews.review_description: I am new to VR and am still exploring.  I end every session with Float.  I feel refreshed and centered after every Float session and plan to make time for it every day.
So beautiful,  soothing, and colorful! The psychedelic mandolin in the App lab took me away...far, far, away🌌. I LOVE this experience ❤️

Since participating in Float I find my dreams are more often and I remember most of them.  It is nice that there is new content now and then as well.  The new winterscape is in peachy tones and is relaxing and rejuvenating.

Hello. Hope this message ends being read by someone who can help? I have purchased and downloaded the app. Wants me to register with email account so I can activate the app, okay no problem right? Except the app will not send the register verification email to me? Before anyone asks, yes it's the correct email. 
Thanks JRussel

developer_response.body: Hey JRussel, we are sorry you're experiencing this. Please contact us at hello@floatvr.io so we can assist you. You can also always click the "send feedback" button inside the app, or reply to any of our emails. Looking forward to helping you Float.

reviews.review_description: Edit: after all the time I waited for an email. I finally get it just to find out I have to pay for a subscription to unlock it. I am not gonna pay for a subscription to this when I have an app that’s similar and I don’t have to pay for a subscription. I think I’ll stick with the app I already have. Boo to the subscriptions! rather pay for an app outright and then ￼ choose what paid download content I want ￼

developer_response.body: We are sorry you got that impression. You do not actually have to pay for a subscription unlock it the main experience. Subscribing is meant for those who use it regularly and would like to have additional features and customization options. We add new features and content all the time, as you can see in other comments here, and being a subscriber means you support this hard work and enjoy its fruits. I am sure you do not want anyone to work for free. That being said, we made the free version very useful so that our casual users can use it for free forever. A single star simply because there's a paid option is probably not giving other users an accurate representation of the value. Nevertheless, we respect your point of view and wish you good luck.

reviews.review_description: The float experience is absolutely amazing. It truly is a space to let go of thinking and just BE. It keeps getting all the time. Keep ip the good work!!

I so badly wanted to try this app, but for 3 days, I've tried to open it and it just hangs up telling me it's "watering the garden... Just a sec " or "fabricating futures... Just a sec". It never loaded and ran my battery out waiting for my fabricated future in a watered garden. Sighhhh. If it doesn't work, I can't enjoy it therefore I can't recommend it either😔

developer_response.body:
Hi Pepper46,  we are very sorry you are experiencing this issue. Please contact us at hello@floatvr.io and we'll help you get there. As a first aid solution: 
(1) Make sure you are connected to WiFi and the connection is good (only critical for the first time the app runs). 
(2) If you are and it's still not working, please re-install the app. 
The most likely explanation is that something didn't load well from the cloud the first time you ran it. 
Looking forward to having you Floating with us :-)

reviews.review_description: Good for relaxation quick
"I really enjoy this app! I have another one, but this one is definitely better with a lot of more options! Well worth it!"
I tried to pay for the subscription so that I could unlock everything and my bank rejected it as fraud.

developer_response.body: Hi - We're sorry you were experiencing this. We use an industry standard payment processor which usually works fine but some banks are finicky. I would suggest contacting your bank as that is out of our control. We would love to do whatever it takes to make sure you get Floating! Please reach out if you'd like our assistance. We would also appreciate if you change your review so that it's based on the software rather than the payment processor. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Great app to de stress and relax
